title: A Land of Twigs
description: A Land of Twigs is a vanilla+ modpack that blends Create, Farmer’s Delight, No Man’s Land, and various QoL mods. Together, they create a fresh new experience that while familiar, expands on vanilla Minecraft without losing its core charm.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7e245bb4e2de17bc35891bcb43cca21027a9dbd.png)
# Features

🌿 Balanced Lightweight modpack which keeps the core game intact while expanding it thoughtfully

🌿 Powered by **[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)** for mechanical automation and contraptions  

🌿 Expanded cooking and farming with **[Farmer’s Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)** and companion add-ons  

🌿 Exploration challenges and survival twists with **[No Man’s Land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land)**

🌿 Dozens of **new biomes, structures, and creatures** to discover  

🌿 **Quality of Life** features such as [Xaero’s Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [XP Tomes](https://modrinth.com/mod/xp-tome)  

🌿 Overhauled world generation with biome, loot, and structure tweaks  

🌿 Fully compatible with shaders

🌿 100+ Mods

![Forest with a Tortoise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ec5b0ad2ebad29b2eba6e1acd832e89ac1ea539.jpeg)

_

**Minimum RAM: 4 GB**

**Recommended RAM: 8 GB**
